title: Shipping
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ysNqdxL.png)

---

### The name says it all.

This mod adds new blocks and items around the theme of shipping and mail.

**Mailboxes, letters** and **cardboard boxes.**

This mod is perfect for multiplayer.
*See the ingame screenshots in the screenshot tab 👆*

To put items in a mailbox, you need to **right-click** on the mailbox. 

---

### <u>**Important information:**</u>
- Mailboxes can have a maximum of 16 items in one slot
- To register a mailbox to you, right-click in. So you are then the owner
- The insertion of items is related to the slot. If you throw in an item and the same again, the new item takes a new slot. But if you throw 2 or more of the same item into a mailbox, this insertion takes a slot
- Letters have 2 inventory slots, packages have 4
- There are 2 different types of mailboxes. One variant stands on the floor, the other can hang on the wall. Both work in the same way

---

- I recommend using JEI to get a better overview of the different recipes\
-> **Find JEI here: https://modrinth.com/mod/jei**

---

### Recipes:
![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/EHjLgXm.png 'Recipe to craft items and blocks')
![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/UnKWrjV.png 'Recipe to craft items and blocks')

Works with any type of wood with the corresponding variant
